newsItem.headline: Diomande integrated into Ivory Coast 2026 World Cup squad by coach Emerse Fae

newNews.reasoning: New call-up to 2026 World Cup squad not previously in existing news. Prior call-up (May 27, 2026) was for World Cup qualifiers/friendlies. This is the final squad confirmation.

newsItem.headline: Senegal international Diao excluded from 2026 World Cup squad despite AFCON call-up

newNews.reasoning: New information: Diao was called up for AFCON 2025 but did not make Senegal's 2026 World Cup squad. This represents a significant status development not previously documented.

newsItem.headline: Faye starts vs PSG in Lorient 2-2 draw; confirms full recovery and regular playing status

newNews.reasoning: While an appearance vs PSG on May 2 appears in existing news, the research confirms Faye's full reintegration and status change from injury to regular_starter. This validates the status correction needed.

newsItem.headline: Campbell left out of Hugo Broos' Bafana Bafana 2026 World Cup squad despite title win

newNews.reasoning: New information: Campbell missed out on 2026 World Cup squad selection. Existing news shows AFCON call-up and non-appearance, but this represents the next competitive disappointment and is newly confirmed as of Jun 8 sweep.

statusChanges.source: Transfermarkt / Wiwsport / RotoWire - Multiple May 2026 appearance confirmations show full recovery and consistent playing time
